$note: Single source of truth for EVM chainId -> LayerZero V2 endpoint ID (EID). Consumed by tasks/syncLayerZeroEids.ts (regenerates the `mappings` arrays in frax.json / superset.json) and pinned by AcrossV4SwapFacet's drift test. When adding a chain, verify the EID against https://docs.layerzero.network/v2/deployments/deployed-contracts and add it here only. Solana uses the LI.FI non-EVM chain id (LiFiData.LIFI_CHAIN_ID_SOLANA).
